## Summary

<!-- What does this change, and why? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, …) — squash-merge uses it as the commit and in the release notes
- [ ] `just build-all` succeeds (solution builds, warnings-as-errors)
- [ ] `just test` passes (Core unit tests)
- [ ] Docs / comments updated where behavior changed

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).
